name: You are vitamins in my routine
original_name: You are vitamins in my routine
overview:
The next story of “You are the cream in my coffee”

When she becomes the cream in the coffee and she becomes the vitamins in the routine.

The sequel of “You are the cream in my coffee” meets P’Pun and N’Ava again in “You are vitamins in my routine” their love story in a good atmosphere among waves of the sea.

trailers.title: SUB] [Behind The Scenes] You are vitamins in my routine | #glseries
